author: y4rr
content: Surface inventory complete. ferrotorch-ml/src/lib.rs re-exports: preprocess (StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder), decomposition (PCA), model_selection (KFold, train_test_split) — all 5 configs runnable. Adapter primitives (tensor_to_array2/array2_to_tensor) exist. ferrolearn-decomp PCA uses (n-1) cov (matches sklearn). ferrolearn-preprocess StandardScaler uses biased var /n (matches sklearn default). ferrolearn-preprocess OneHotEncoder takes Array2<usize> — strings must be label-encoded externally (Python pin uses alphabetical {a:0,b:1,c:2}; rust mirror passes same encoded indices). KFold/train_test_split use rust SmallRng — set-equality only per spec.
